# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: backup-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    location: US
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    logging:
      logBucket: backup-logs-bucket
      logObjectMetadata: true
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    labels:
      environment: production
      purpose: backup-storage
    cors:
    - origin: "*"
      method: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
      responseHeader: ["*"]
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: error.html
    billing:
      requesterPays: false
    retentionPolicy:
      retentionPeriod: 0
    iamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers
      - role: roles/storage.admin
        members:
        - projectOwner
        - serviceAccount:backup-service-account@project-id.iam.gserviceaccount.com
